---
title: "Aniruddha Girish Aramanekoppa"
---

::: {.hero}
# Introduction

Hello! I am an astronomy research engineer at the Paris Observatory. I work on the detection of new exoplanets around nearby stars using several techniques. Check out my [About Me](about.qmd) and [Research](research.qmd) pages for more information about my work!


<div style="display:flex; gap:24px; justify-content:center;">

<img src="images/CNRS Logo.png" width="10%">
<img src="images/LIRA Logo.png" width="60%">

</div>

:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card}

## Research Interests

- Exoplanets
- Astrometry
- Direct Imaging
- Radial Velocity
- Transits
- Spectroscopy

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card}

## Contact

LinkedIn: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/aniruddha-aramanekoppa/>

aniruddha ["dot"] aramanekoppa ["at"] obspm ["dot"] fr

:::
:::

:::
